LanguageData.VGE_GravhulkLaunch.description: Travel to a remote destination using your gravship. Every crewmember aboard contributes greatly to launch success, making a full crew highly valuable. However, smaller thrusters provide no benefit to the launch. You’ll also gather gravdata during the journey to advance research. At the end, you can choose to keep the old map open or abandon it.
LanguageData.VGE_GravhulkLaunch.label: gravhulk launch
LanguageData.VGE_GravjumperLaunch.description: Travel to a remote destination using your gravjumper. The pilot’s skill is the most important factor for a successful launch, with the co-pilot also providing a strong boost. Additional crew can help, but only to a small degree compared to a standard gravship. At the end, you can choose to keep the old map open or abandon it.
LanguageData.VGE_GravjumperLaunch.label: gravjumper launch
LanguageData.VGE_IdeoRole_EngineeringSpecialist.descr: A special ideoligious status focused on maintaining and improving gravship systems to the exclusion of all else. This specialized role grants increased construction and repair efficiency, and the ability to coordinate nearby crew to improve maintenance operations across the ship. Holders of this role dedicate themselves entirely to the shipâ€™s well-being.
LanguageData.VGE_IdeoRole_EngineeringSpecialist.label: engineering specialist
LanguageData.VGE_IdeoRole_Navigator.description: A special ideoligious status focused on the study of stellar phenomena and long-range navigation. Navigators guide the gravship through orbit and deep space, interpreting gravitational currents and charting safe passage between worlds. Their understanding of the cosmos greatly improves the shipâ€™s research efficiency and travel safety.
LanguageData.VGE_IdeoRole_Navigator.label: navigator
LanguageData.VGE_IdeoRole_PilotingSpecialist.descript: A special ideoligious status devoted to the art of flight and control of gravship engines. Piloting specialists are trained to maneuver the vessel through planetary orbits and emergency situations, keeping the crew alive when systems fail. They can save the gravship and the crew from peril.
LanguageData.VGE_IdeoRole_PilotingSpecialist.label: piloting specialist
